sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الطِّفْلُ الْفَوَاكِهَ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ الْحَلَوَى.
sentences.translation: Dijete više voli voće nego slatkiše.
sentences.translationEn: The child likes fruit more than sweets.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ تُفَّاحَةً حَمْرَاءَ بَعْدَ الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan jede crvenu jabuku nakon škole.
sentences.translationEn: Every day he eats a red apple after school.

sentences.arabic: تَقُولُ أُمُّهُ: الْفَاكِهَةُ صِحِّيَّةٌ وَجَيِّدَةٌ لَكَ.
sentences.translation: Majka mu kaže: Voće je zdravo i dobro za tebe.
sentences.translationEn: His mother says: Fruit is healthy and good for you.

sentences.translation: Dijete se slaže i jede sa apetitom.
sentences.translationEn: The child agrees and eats with appetite.
